LightningComponentBundle.description: Pricing waterfall display for a sales transaction line. Shows price summary, execution status, and execution log from PricingProcessExecution records.

property.name: historyPageSize
property.label: History Page Size
property.description: Number of pricing runs shown per page in Pricing History.

property.name: showPriceSummary
property.label: Show Price Summary
property.description: Show or hide the Price Summary section.

property.name: showCurrentExecution
property.label: Show Current Execution
property.description: Show or hide the Current Execution section.
